Employment
	




Join Our Team
At Beckta Dining & Wine, we’re always looking for passionate and talented individuals. Masters of their craft in food, beverage and hospitality, or for those looking to learn from some of the top performers in their field. Be part of a group of individuals committed to a caring workplace with abundant professional development opportunities. Our shared values are: caring, commitment and authenticity.

Benefits:
Competitive wages
Health/ dental benefits (after three months for employees working 30+ hours/week)
Paid sick days
Employee discounts on dining
Staff meal
Full-time
Part-time
Permanent
Flexible- scheduling
Closed holidays



Additional Benefits:
We are an inclusive work environment, that respects and nurtures their employees. We believe in balance, if you want to learn and grow with us we often promote from within and avail our staff with education and professional development opportunities as often as possible.

Kitchen positions: please download and complete the application form below and email it, along with a resume it to jobs@beckta.com
For Front-of-House Management positions, please send your CV to jobs@beckta.com
Server, bar & front of house support positions: please download and complete the application form below and email it, along with a resume to . info@b
